name: Opening Matchday Verdicts
angle: A serious read of the 2026 World Cup's opening round of group games: Scotland ending a 36-year wait for a World Cup win, Brazil pegged back by Morocco, the USA's four-goal answer to Paraguay and Australia's upset of Turkiye. Built for fans who watched.

questions.question: Mexico opened the 2026 World Cup with a 2-0 win in Mexico City over which side?
The United States began their home campaign with a 4-1 win over which South American side?
Australia produced one of the opening round's biggest upsets, beating which side 2-0?
Alongside Folarin Balogun's brace, which playmaker was also on the scoresheet in the United States' 4-1 win over Paraguay?
The United States' 4-1 win over Paraguay was led by a brace from which striker?
Brazil were held to a 1-1 draw by Morocco. Who scored Brazil's equaliser?
Scotland beat Haiti 1-0 to go top of Group C, thanks to a deflected first-half strike from which midfielder?
Korea Republic recovered from a goal down to win their opener against which European side?
Co-hosts Canada were held to a 1-1 draw in their opening game by whom?
Switzerland dominated possession and shots but were pegged back to a 1-1 draw by which side?
Mexico's 2-0 win over South Africa, settled by Julian Quinones and Raul Jimenez, was marred by how many red cards?
Australia's surprise 2-0 win over Turkiye was opened by a 27th-minute goal from which young winger?
Which midfielder gave Morocco an early lead against Brazil before Vinicius Junior levelled?
Qatar's late equaliser against Switzerland was scored by which experienced campaigner?
Scotland's win over Haiti was their first at a World Cup since 1990. Which unwanted World Cup record do they hold?

options.A: Most appearances without ever reaching the knockout stage
options.B: Most red cards at a single World Cup

sources: https://www.skysports.com/football/news/12098/13552605/world-cup-2026-mexico-2-0-south-africa-julian-quinones-and-raul-jimenez-score-as-co-hosts-win-opener-in-game-of-three-red-cards (Sky Sports — Mexico 2-0 South Africa; Quinones and Jimenez; three red cards)
https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/mexico-vs-south-africa-live-updates-world-cup-2026-score-result/live/ (CBS — Mexico 2-0 South Africa, three red cards)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/2026-world-cup-schedule-scores-results-brazil-morocco-qatar-switzerland-australia-turkey-haiti-scotland-saturday-group-stage-play-145258957.html (Yahoo — Brazil 1-1 Morocco: Saibari then Vinicius Junior; Scotland 1-0 Haiti: McGinn; Australia 2-0 Turkiye: Irankunda 27', Metcalfe 75'; Switzerland 1-1 Qatar: Khoukhi late)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49055260/haiti-scotland-world-cup-2026-result-score-recap-john-mcginn-ben-gannon-doak-group-c (ESPN — Haiti 0-1 Scotland, McGinn, Group C; first World Cup win since 1990)
https://theanalyst.com/articles/haiti-vs-scotland-stats-world-cup-2026 (Opta Analyst — McGinn ends 28-year World Cup wait; Scotland's first scorer since Craig Burley 1998)
